title: 😸LAON
header_desc:
I build convenient and useful browser extensions and desktop tools.
Donations are a huge support for continuous development and maintenance!
project1_desc: A powerful productivity extension to choose and bulk archive or delete unwanted ChatGPT conversation tabs with one click.
project2_desc: A tech helper desktop app for Windows and macOS that efficiently auto-cleans resources and allows shortcut key controls.
modal_kakaopay_desc: Scan with your smartphone to send a donation easily.
modal_bank_desc: Please send your warm support to the account below.
